name: Blocky Leap
description: In Blocky Leap, players take control of an expressive, square-headed character navigating a treacherous path of green-topped pylons. By mastering the click and release mechanic, you must launch your hero across wide gaps with perfect timing and precision. Web Dev https://www.kizi10.org/ Set against a vibrant jungle backdrop, this arcade-style challenge tests your focus as you aim for the highest score while leaping from pillar to pillar.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
